name: tesseract
description: Deterministic compiler from Azure DevOps manual tests to Playwright specs.

scripts.sync: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js sync --all
scripts.parse: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js parse --ado-id 10001
scripts.bind: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js bind --ado-id 10001 --strict
scripts.emit: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js emit --ado-id 10001
scripts.compile: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js compile --ado-id 10001
scripts.refresh: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js refresh --ado-id 10001
scripts.run: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js run --ado-id 10001 --interpreter-mode diagnostic
scripts.paths: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js paths --ado-id 10001
scripts.inbox: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js inbox
scripts.approve: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js approve
scripts.rerun-plan: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js rerun-plan
scripts.benchmark: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js benchmark --benchmark flagship-policy-journey
scripts.scorecard: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js scorecard --benchmark flagship-policy-journey
scripts.dogfood: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js dogfood
scripts.capture: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js capture --screen policy-search --section results-with-policy
scripts.surface: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js surface --screen policy-search
scripts.workflow: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js workflow --ado-id 10001
scripts.graph: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js graph
scripts.trace: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js trace --ado-id 10001
scripts.impact: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js impact --node element:policy-search:searchButton
scripts.types: npm run build && node dist/bin/tesseract.js types
scripts.lint: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const Module=module.constructor;const file=path.resolve('scripts/lint.cjs');const code=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8');const m=new Module(file);m.filename=file;m.paths=[path.resolve('node_modules')];process.argv=['node',file,...process.argv.slice(1)];m._compile(code,file);" --
scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const Module=module.constructor;const file=path.resolve('scripts/check.cjs');const code=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8');const m=new Module(file);m.filename=file;m.paths=[path.resolve('node_modules')];process.argv=['node',file];m._compile(code,file);"
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.speedrun: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/speedrun.ts
scripts.dashboard: npm run build && npx tsx dashboard/server.ts
scripts.dashboard:live: npm run build && npx tsx dashboard/server.ts --speedrun --count 50 --max-iterations 5
